JournalArticle.__title: <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?><root available-locales="en_US" default-locale="en_US"><Title language-id="en_US">About S.P.A.C.E.</Title></root>
JournalArticle.__content:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root available-locales="en_US" default-locale="en_US"> <dynamic-element name="title" type="text_box" index-type="keyword" instance-id="pvtn"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US"><![CDATA[Who Will You Become?]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="image1" type="image" index-type="keyword" instance-id="yeja"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US" alt="" name="dream (1).jpg" title="dream (1).jpg" type="document"><![CDATA[[$dl-reference=/group/20233/com.liferay.document.library.kernel.model.DLFileEntry/32028.xml$]]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="heading1" type="text_box" index-type="keyword" instance-id="xoqj"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US"><![CDATA[Dream even bigger]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="content1" type="text_box" index-type="keyword" instance-id="lqcd"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US"><![CDATA[Think your dreams are too lofty? We’ll raise you twenty and bet that classes with our award-winning faculty will illuminate possibilities you haven’t even considered. The sky is no longer the limit.]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="image2" type="image" index-type="keyword" instance-id="rwuo"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US" alt="" name="future.jpg" title="future.jpg" type="document"><![CDATA[[$dl-reference=/group/20233/com.liferay.document.library.kernel.model.DLFileEntry/32014.xml$]]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="heading2" type="text_box" index-type="keyword" instance-id="vvmd"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US"><![CDATA[Find your future]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="content2" type="text_box" index-type="keyword" instance-id="dipj"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US"><![CDATA[S.P.A.C.E. is a vocation-minded school for vocation-minded students. We believe in helping you reach new heights, unlock your potential, and discover your passion.]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="image3" type="image" index-type="keyword" instance-id="vvnd"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US" alt="" name="lift-off.jpg" title="lift-off.jpg" type="document"><![CDATA[[$dl-reference=/group/20233/com.liferay.document.library.kernel.model.DLFileEntry/32000.xml$]]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="heading3" type="text_box" index-type="keyword" instance-id="xter"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US"><![CDATA[Prepare for lift-off]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="content3" type="text_box" index-type="keyword" instance-id="avnq"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US"><![CDATA[We don’t just teach you—we equip you to take on the real-life challenges of being an… Astronaut? Aeronautics engineer? AI expert? You get to fill in the blank.]]></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> <dynamic-element name="Image6kp8" type="image" index-type="keyword" instance-id="mnco"> <dynamic-content language-id="en_US"></dynamic-content> </dynamic-element> </root>
